verses.2: Clouds and darkness are around him.
verses.4: His lightning lights up the world.
verses.5: The mountains melt like wax at the presence of the LORD,
verses.7: Let all them be shamed who serve engraved images,
verses.9: For you, LORD, are most high above all the earth.
verses.10: You who love the LORD, hate evil!
verses.11: Light is sown for the righteous,
verses.12: Be glad in the LORD, you righteous people!
